name: The Marked Hour
specialty: The Marked Hour, a pair of skilled infiltrators, are known for their stealth and precision, often tackling high-risk missions that others deem impossible.

members.name: Thalia Vestige
members.note: Scarred face from countless battles, always seen with a silver mask covering her disfigured features

members.name: Kael Vex
members.note: His fur is a unique shade of purple, a mark of his connection to the Obsidian Lotus, and a constant reminder of his allegiance

visual: Clad in dark, form-fitting armor, both members are adorned with obsidian jewelry and carry a pair of hidden daggers. They move with a quiet confidence, their every step a testament to their professionalism.
reputation_note: The Marked Hour, while feared by their enemies, are respected by their peers. Their reputation as unyielding and loyal members of the Obsidian Lotus precedes them in the Undercity.
